who: logistics managers in small e-commerce businesses processing 10-20 invoices/month
offer: For logistics managers in small e-commerce businesses processing 10-20 invoices/month, discrepancies cause late orders. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of delivery records and invoices.
problem: discrepancies between delivery records and invoiced shipments
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics managers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
DM outreach to logistics managers with a demo video
Participate in community forums for logistics tools sharing
try_it: Let users try a weekly notification system for discrepancies
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Allow CSV import for existing delivery records
Enable one-click export of simple reports
